title: Renewable Diesel Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2025
content:
North American Renewable Diesel Growth Stalls Amid Credit Transition, Trade Barriers, and Policy Ambiguity

The first half of 2025 saw RD Producers in â€˜Wait-and-Seeâ€™ Mode Amid RFS and Â§45Z Rule Ambiguity North American renewable diesel production is projected to stall in Q2 and Q3 2025 at 708 million gallons This flat trend reflects ongoing uncertainty stemming from the transition to the Â§45Z Clean Fuel Credit, reduced RIN incentives for imported feedstocks, and policy ambiguity
author: Sanyam Malik
